name: Plaza III Steak Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a soup pot that holds at least 20 cups.
2. Gradually blend in flour to make a smooth paste.
3. Add hot water gradually until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
4. Simmer until smooth.
5. Sauté beef in a large skillet, then drain off excess fat (rinsing under very hot water can help remove more fat).
6. Stir meat, bouillon, all vegetables, and seasonings into the saucepan.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are cooked through.
9. Do not add additional salt.
10. The soup can be frozen for later use.
Note: For enhanced flavor, you may substitute Accent seasoning mix with approximately 1 tablespoon of Old Bay Seasoning or your preferred spice blend, adjusted according to the preferences of those who will be enjoying the soup.
